title: safety.viz outlier-explorer data contract
description: Long-format results data: one record per participant per time point per measure (SOE-DATA-001). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; the outlier-explorer removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count (SOE-REG-037) and derives a per-participant measurement sequence when the data carries no visit/study-day column.

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the measure and result columns named in settings, one row per participant per time point per measure.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied (SOE-DATA-003).

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data.

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data.

id_col.description: Participant identifier column; drives the one-line-per-participant series and counts.

unit_col.description: Optional unit column, appended to measure labels.

normal_col_low.description: Optional lower limit of normal; feeds the LLN-ULN normal-range band.

normal_col_high.description: Optional upper limit of normal; feeds the LLN-ULN normal-range band.

normal_range_method.description: Normal-range method: None, LLN-ULN, Standard Deviation, or Quantiles (SOE-FUNC-007).

time_cols.description: Optional time-axis options ({ value_col, label, type, order_col }); when omitted a derived Measurement sequence is used (SOE-FUNC-004).

filters.description: Optional filter columns rendered as controls (SOE-CFG-004).

groups.description: Optional color-by columns for grouping the marks (SOE-REG-048).

details.description: Optional listing columns; defaults derive from the other mappings (SOE-CFG-005).

tooltip_cols.description: Optional extra columns appended to the point tooltip (SOE-CFG-006).
